race.comment: Tricky race to assess with many of these babies facing the starter for the first time. Of the raced brigade MISHANI ADIOS (5) is unlucky to still be a maiden placing in both starts to date and has race experience over a lot of these. Gets 1.5kg weight relief from the inside marble and looks the one they all have to run down. HIGH AUTHORITY (3) looked handy placing at Eagle Farm on debut before maybe suffering from the second-up syndrome last time out. Has since been given time to mature and has revved up for this with two recent trials. Has to be included in calculations. VITAL IMPACT (13) wasn't too far away in town on debut and should find this assignment a touch easier. In the mix. MARIA CLARA (8) placed in a recent trial and any push in betting must be noted.
